name: volunteermatch-ai
description: VolunteerMatch AI - Full Stack Hackathon Project

scripts.dev:emulators: cd backend && npx firebase-tools emulators:start --project demo-volunteermatch
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:emulators" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:dashboard"
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../coordinator-dashboard && npm install && cd ../volunteer-app && npm install
